Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions

Class DTDistinctCase

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.PredicatePositionReasoner
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.AbstractManualInference
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.DTDistinctCase
All Implemented Interfaces:
IReasoner
public class DTDistinctCase extends AbstractManualInference
Makes a distinct case on simple (non inductive) datatypes. Antecedents are created for each constructor.

    DTDistinctCase.Input
    An input adding an optional list of names to the super-class input.

      Returns the unique id of this reasoner, that is the value of the id field used when registering it to the extension point org.eventb.core.seqprover.reasoners.

    • apply

      public IReasonerOutput apply(IProverSequent seq, IReasonerInput reasonerInput, IProofMonitor pm)
      Description copied from interface: IReasoner
      Apply this reasoner to the given sequent with the given input.
      Specified by:
      apply in interface IReasoner
      Overrides:
      apply in class AbstractManualInference
      Parameters:
      seq - the sequent to which this reasoner is applied
      reasonerInput - the input to this reasoner
      pm - a proof monitor (provides cancellation)
      Returns:
      the result of applying this reasoner to the given sequent (either a proof rule or a failure)
      See Also:
      • IProofRule
      • IReasonerFailure

    • deserializeInput

      public IReasonerInput deserializeInput(IReasonerInputReader reader) throws SerializeException
      Description copied from class: PredicatePositionReasoner
      Deserializes the given input using the given writer. If a sub-class overrides this method, it should either call this super method to ensure that the predicate and position are deserialized adequately, or override both this and IReasoner.serializeInput(IReasonerInput, IReasonerInputWriter) to keep the serialization and deserialization consistent.
      Specified by:
      deserializeInput in interface IReasoner
      Overrides:
      deserializeInput in class PredicatePositionReasoner
      Parameters:
      reader - the reader to use
      Returns:
      a new instance of the input that was previously serialized
      Throws:
      SerializeException - In case of error when serializing.
